scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env')&&fs.existsSync('.env.example')){fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env');console.log('[SETUP] Created .env from .env.example (PLACEHOLDER VALUES — edit before production use!)')}['uploads','data'].forEach(d=>{if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true})});console.log('Setup complete!')"
scripts.render-build: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['uploads','data'].forEach(d=>{if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true})});console.log('Render build: directories ready')"
scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist/server.mjs')){console.log('[BUILD] dist/ not found, building project...');require('child_process').execSync('npm run build',{stdio:'inherit'})}" && node dist/server.mjs
scripts.seed: echo '[SEED] No standalone seed script — admin/owner/news/cities are seeded automatically by src/database/index.ts on first run. Use FORCE_RESET_ADMIN_PASSWORD=true to reset the admin password.'
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.aab:release: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
